'''Margaret Towner''' ([[October 1]], [[1920s#1920|1920]] – [[April 10]], [[2017]]) was a veteran British actress who portrayed [[Jira]] in [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']].

Although her role in ''The Phantom Menace'' was relatively brief, she nonetheless became a well-known fixture of fan conventions. She would also talk with fans who visited her home in Twickenham. She passed away in 2017, at the age of 96.<ref name="Obituary" />
